name: Tomato and Leek Casserole
recipeIngredient: Grated cheese (amount optional according to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the leeks.
2. Slice the tomatoes.
3. Layer the sliced leeks and tomatoes in a casserole dish (leeks on the bottom so the juice from the tomatoes helps cook them).
4. Sprinkle with red wine vinegar.
5. Add cheese.
6. Add a layer of bread crumbs.
7. Spice according to taste.
8. Repeat steps 3-6 if desired.
9. Cook at 375°F until the bread crumbs are golden.
Note: The amounts of ingredients in this recipe can be varied. Some people prefer more tomatoes, while others may have allergies and tend to use less. This variation is due to the original source of the recipe from Holland, where cooking times may differ due to different oven temperatures compared to other regions. Many non-vegan friends enjoy this recipe.
